meaning: adj.用尽的,精疲力尽的,失去效能的
examples: She spent her free time shopping.
Detectives have spent months gathering evidence.
He spent more on feeding the dog than he spent on feeding himself.
Taride spent his teenage years hanging around the beach and dreaming of being a musician.
The two platforms spent recent years copying each other's moves, and they're fairly indistinguishable now.
